text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun is taking a break from her
training to go meet a visitor...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Whoa! It's the real Maya—in the flesh!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yup, I'm right here! ☆ Did you come to see me?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I was wondering, uh... Please take this
letter!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wow, the envelope is so cute! Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Let's see what's inside. "My dad and I saw you
race at school."

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're so strong and cute, Maya! You're number
one in my heart!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Yep! Would you mind taking a picture with me?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Copy that! Trainer, could you take the picture?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Thanks! ♪ Picture in three... two... one...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, that came out super nice! ♪ Let's put some
stickers on it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meeting one of her fans seems to have upped
Mayano Top Gun's drive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heads to practice with a seldom-seen
enthusiasm.
